expectations.text: Produces a complete ICP document in this turn, not a list of questions
expectations.evidence: Full ICP delivered with all sections.

expectations.text: Covers firmographics (company size/type), the buyer/user role, and key pains or jobs-to-be-done
expectations.evidence: Firmographics, Decision role (user + economic buyer), Goals/JTBD and Pains all present.

expectations.text: States its assumptions in one line
expectations.evidence: Opening hypothesis + 'Assuming a mid-market warehouse inventory SaaS...; adjust if wrong.'

expectations.text: Does NOT gate or refuse to deliver pending answers
expectations.evidence: Delivers immediately; validation question is optional at the end.

expectations.text: Includes at least one buying trigger or where-to-reach-them detail
